description: A marketing analyst wants to calculate the lifetime value of a specific customer.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all past orders for a given customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a complete list of the customer's orders.

nodes.task_description: Sum the total value of all their orders.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the total revenue from the customer.

nodes.task_description: Optionally, apply a formula to estimate future value based on purchase frequency and average order value.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an estimated Customer Lifetime Value.
